achievements.description: Defeat Dinque in area 8 of the ruins without resting and without using the Vanishing Potion

achievements.description: Give the imp back his home after defeating Dinque in area 8 of the ruins

achievements.description: Obtain the Demonic Shield on 5F of the tower

achievements.title: Walking No More
achievements.description: Obtain Warp Magic on 8F of the tower or later, equip it in your quick slots and use it on this floor or later

achievements.title: Three on the Left, Five on the Right
achievements.description: Help soldier Gadi solve the puzzle on 9F of the tower
